title: ficinia arenicola var. erecta
intro: Ficinia arenicola var. erecta, also known as the coastal hair sedge, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the family Cyperaceae. This plant has been traditionally used in medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Ficinia arenicola var. erecta include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve respiratory issues, and boost the immune system. The herbal preparations of this plant include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
